evals.name: trigger-which-component
evals.prompt: Which Vuetify component should I use for a toast notification, and what is the project default for buttons?

assertions.text: States the project default for v-btn (flat variant, rounded lg)
References the component selection decision tree

evals.name: trigger-color-token-and-ssr
evals.prompt: What hex value is the primary color token, and how do I instantiate Vuetify for SSR vs the client?

assertions.text: Uses createApplicationVuetify(true) on the server and createApplicationVuetify(false) on the client
Explains the ssr flag ensures correct hydration

evals.name: negative-form-validation
evals.prompt: Write me a login form with email validation rules and a submit handler.

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-overview; routes to vuetify-forms instead
